headline: AH Realty Closes Sale of 9 Multifamily Properties to Harbor Group
summary: AHRT closes the sale of nine multifamily properties to Harbor Group for $485M, uses proceeds to cut debt and advance its portfolio transformation.

raw.headline: AH Realty Closes Sale of 9 Multifamily Properties to Harbor Group
raw.summary: AHRT closes the sale of nine multifamily properties to Harbor Group for $485M, uses proceeds to cut debt and advance its portfolio transformation.

headline: Gladstone Announces Acquisition for $22.75M in Newport News, VA
summary: GOOD acquires a $22.75M industrial property in Newport News, using internal cash flow. It is 100% leased by a Huntington Ingalls Industries subsidiary.

raw.headline: Gladstone Announces Acquisition for $22.75M in Newport News, VA
raw.summary: GOOD acquires a $22.75M industrial property in Newport News, using internal cash flow. It is 100% leased by a Huntington Ingalls Industries subsidiary.

headline: OUT Taps Into LA Union Station to Expand Experiential Ad Opportunities
summary: OUT's advertising and experiential program launch at the Los Angeles Union Station boosts premium digital ad inventory, opening new revenue growth opportunities.
